extract: Mahalo Trail (Japanese: マハロ山道 Mahalo Mountain Trail) is a location in Alola. It connects Iki Town and the Ruins of Conflict. In the Pokémon Sun and Pokémon Moon Special Demo Version, a woman at the east end of the road in front of the Hau'oli City Pokémon Center will guide the player here. She will also guide the player back to the city from the trail. At the top of the trail, the player will encounter a "mysterious" man in a red shirt who will give the player Stardust to transfer to their full game. The player can revisit him, but the man will have no further gifts for them.
